title: bump_portrevision
description: Increment PORTREVISION in the port's Makefile (insert if missing).

scope.description: Target build line for this op. '@any' (default) applies universally on every build. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time. NOTE: PORTREVISION is part of the port's package identity; scoping a bump to one build line is rarely correct. Use @any unless you have a specific reason.
